languages.text:
The user can equip two-handed melee weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws).
If the user has a ranged weapon in the left hand, the first attack per turn made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 AP.

traits.locale_text:
The user can equip two-handed melee weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws).
If the user has a ranged weapon in the left hand, the first attack per turn made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 AP.

languages.text:
The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws).
If the user has a ranged weapon in their left hand, the first {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack per turn{/g} made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
languages.original_text:
The user can equip two-handed melee weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws).
If the user has a ranged weapon in the left hand, the first attack per turn made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 AP.

traits.locale_text:
The user can equip two-handed melee weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws), but deals −15% less damage and can perform only basic attacks with them.
If the user has a ranged weapon in the left hand, the first attack per turn made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 AP
Melee attacks made with a two-handed weapon in this hand force targets to pass a Toughness resistance test with a −{uip|DC|fed3bf294e854602b77993da33dda329} penalty or become staggered for 1 round.

The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws).
If the user has a ranged weapon in their left hand, the first {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack per turn{/g} made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.

The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws).
If the user has a ranged weapon in their left hand, the first {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack per turn{/g} made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.

The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws), but deals −15% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and can perform only basic attacks with them.
If the user has a ranged weapon in the left hand, the first {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack per turn{/g} made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}.
Targets {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} by melee attacks made with a two-handed weapon in this hand must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|fed3bf294e854602b77993da33dda329} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} or become {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.

languages.text:
Обладатель аугмента может носить двуручное оружие {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g} (кроме посохов и камнерезок) в этой руке.
Если у носителя аугмента в левой руке дальнобойное оружие, первая {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}атака за ход{/g} двуручным оружием в этой руке стоит на −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g} меньше.

languages.text:
使用者可以用这只手持有双手{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}武器（法杖和岩锯除外）。
如果使用者左手持有远程武器，则{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}每回合{/g}第一次使用这只手持双手武器进行攻击时，{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}消耗减少1点。

If the user has a ranged weapon in their left hand, the first {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack per turn{/g} made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.

traits.locale_text:
使用者可以用这只手持有双手{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}武器（法杖和岩锯除外）。

languages.text:
L'utilisateur peut équiper cette main d'armes de {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}mêlée{/g} à deux mains (hors bâtons et disqueuses).
Si l'utilisateur a une arme à distance dans la main gauche, la première {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attaque par tour{/g} lancée avec une arme à deux mains dans cette main coûte −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.
languages.original_text:

If the user has a ranged weapon in their left hand, the first {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack per turn{/g} made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.

traits.locale_text:

Si l'utilisateur a une arme à distance dans la main gauche, la première {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attaque par tour{/g} lancée avec une arme à deux mains dans cette main coûte −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.

languages.text:
El usuario puede equipar armas {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} de dos manos en esta mano (excepto báculos y sierras de roca).
Si el usuario tiene un arma a distancia en la mano izquierda, el primer {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}ataque del turno{/g} con un arma a dos manos en esta mano cuesta −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} menos.

languages.text:
Der Nutzer kann zweihändige {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfwaffen{/g} in dieser Hand ausrüsten (mit Ausnahme von Stäben und Felssägen).
Hat der Nutzer eine Fernkampfwaffe in der linken Hand, kostet der erste {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}Angriff pro Zug{/g} mit einer zweihändigen Waffe in dieser Hand –1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} weniger.
languages.original_text:

traits.locale_text:
Der Nutzer kann zweihändige {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampf{/g}waffen in dieser Hand ausrüsten (mit Ausnahme von Stäben und Felssägen).
Hat der Nutzer eine Fernkampfwaffe in der linken Hand, kostet der erste {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}Angriff pro Zug{/g} mit einer zweihändigen Waffe in dieser Hand –1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} weniger.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, bu elinde çift el {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş{/g} silahları kuşanabilir (asa ve kaya testeresi hariç).
Kullanıcının sol elinde menzilli silah varsa bu elindeki çift el silahıyla yaptığı ilk {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}tur başına saldırı{/g}, 1 puan daha az {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} harcar.
languages.original_text:
The user can equip two-handed {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons in this hand (excluding staves and rock saws).
If the user has a ranged weapon in their left hand, the first {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attack per turn{/g} made with a two-handed weapon in this hand costs −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.

traits.locale_text:
Kullanıcı, bu elinde çift el {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş{/g} silahları kuşanabilir (asa ve kaya testeresi hariç).

languages.text:
使用者はこの手に両手{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接{/g}武器を装備できる（杖およびロックソーを除く）。
使用者が左手に遠隔武器を持っている場合、この手の両手武器で行うそのターン最初の{g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}攻撃{/g}は{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}コストが−1される。
